title: Reference Selfie Cartoon Doodle Transform AI Prompt
sourceTitle: Reference Selfie Cartoon Doodle Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image playful hand-drawn cartoon selfie transformation for real-life overhead couple selfie before playful doodle cartoon transformation, preserving stylish adult couple from the source selfie wearing black outfits and sunglasses, man with mustache and green plaid cap, woman with hair bun, both holding ice cream cones. Subject: stylish adult couple from the source selfie wearing black outfits and sunglasses, man with mustache and green plaid cap, woman with hair bun, both holding ice cream cones remain in the uploaded selfie composition with preserved couple relationship, overhead selfie perspective, black outfits, sunglasses, ice cream cones, and key identity-safe styling cues. Scene: bright white background filled with colorful doodles: smiling sun, flowers, hearts, stars, leaves, squiggles, clouds, tiny dots, and playful hand-drawn decorations replaces the background with a bright white doodle canvas while keeping the couple centered and the cheerful summer relationship mood intact. Composition: Preserve the uploaded selfie angle, top-down framing, couple placement, pose relationship, hand positions, ice cream placement, cap position, sunglasses, and body proportions as the fixed image-to-image structure. Signature Elements: green plaid cap with bold white text, black sunglasses, black outfits, brown crossbody bag, hair bun, and visible ice cream cones stay recognizable while colorful doodles surround the characters evenly without changing the selfie structure. Style: Cute doodle art style, flat vector illustration, clean bold outlines, simplified facial features, rosy cheeks, expressive cartoon eyes, textured brush strokes, Scandinavian children book charm, whimsical sticker-art finish, and Instagram-friendly lifestyle poster mood. Color Palette: Fixed bright white canvas, soft pastel base, vibrant accent doodles, black outfit blocks, green plaid cap accent, warm ice cream tones, rosy cheeks, and cheerful summer color pops. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Top-down selfie perspective translated into illustration, couple centered, visible ice cream cones, clean vertical social-poster framing, and balanced decorative doodle fill. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
